entry.title: Lissy93 closed a pull request in dashy
entry.content:
Lissy93 closed Lissy93/dashy#2091 · April 24, 2026 14:57
.2033454656531788:dbc2973db392b225acb591dbefa86e23_69eb3bb02eeccc68fcc5008a.69eb3bb12eeccc68fcc5008c.69eb3bb196d678dfa33af7f3:Trae CN.T(2026/4/24 17:45:21) #2091

feat(错误处理): 实现全面的错误分类与格式化系统

新增错误类型枚举和分类函数，增强错误处理能力

重构代理服务和组件错误展示，提供更友好的错误信息

添加详细的错误测试用例，确保分类逻辑的准确性

+2,124 -110
3 comments

entry.title: Lissy93 closed an issue in dashy
entry.content:
Lissy93 closed an issue in Lissy93/dashy · April 22, 2026 02:24
[FEEDBACK] Demo running 4 year old version #1961
The demo at https://demo.dashy.to/home is running version 1.9.2. To really showcase what Dashy is about it should probably run a more modern versio…

entry.title: Lissy93 closed a pull request in awesome-privacy
entry.content:
Lissy93 closed Lissy93/awesome-privacy#513 · April 21, 2026 01:37
Add 4 online privacy-benchmark tools to Online Tools #513

What this PR adds

Four browser-based privacy-benchmark tools to Essentials → Security Tools → Online Tools, alongside existing peers like Am I Unique?
